import pdfplumber

with pdfplumber.open\('benverde 24-02.pdf'\) as pdf:
    tabelas = pdf.pages[0].extract_tables\(\)
    # Pegar a tabela grande \(13 colunas\)
    for i, tab in enumerate\(tabelas\):
        if tab and len\(tab[0]\) >= 10:
            print\(f'=== Tabela {i+1}: {len\(tab\)} linhas x {len\(tab[0]\)} colunas ==='\)
            for j, row in enumerate\(tab\):
                print\(f'  [{j:02d}] {row}'\)
" 2>&1)
